name: --launch
-x
options.description: Launches Xcode, opening a new empty unsaved file

name: --create
-c
options.description: Creates any non-existent files in the file list. If used without --launch, standard input will be read and piped to the last file created

name: --wait
-w
options.description: Wait for the files to be closed before exiting. xed will idle and will only terminate when all files are closed

name: --line
-l
options.description: Selects the given line in the last file opened

name: --background
-b
options.description: Opens Xcode without activating it; the process that invoked xed remains in front

name: --version
-v
options.description: Prints the version number of xed
